tooltip.relics.entropic_hourglass.descri: An ancient temporal artifact, thrumming with contained entropy. It passively absorbs the fabric of time, storing it as raw temporal energy. This energy can be unleashed to hyper-accelerate machines or supercharge living creatures.
tooltip.relics.entropic_hourglass.abilit: Passively absorbs temporal energy over time. Stored time fuels all active abilities.

Right-click a block to inject temporal energy, accelerating it for 30 seconds. Works on machines, furnaces, crops, saplings, and any block with random ticks. Cycle through speeds by clicking the same block.
Right-click a living entity to overclock its biological processes for 30 seconds. Re-clicking the same entity extends duration and can upgrade speed. Costs stored time proportional to potency.
message.sands_of_time.no_line_of_sight: §cNo line of sight to target entity!
Controls when the stored time HUD is displayed. ON_USE: only after using an ability. ALWAYS: always visible. OFF: never.
List of block IDs that cannot be accelerated by Temporal Injection.
List of entity IDs that cannot be overclocked by Bio-Overclock.
tooltip.relics.entropic_hourglass.abilit: %1$s seconds of stored time per real second.
